1.content:
You were walking on the street dissapointed. You recently lost your job. Your girlfriend cheated on you and you were now homeless. You didnt have much to go on in your life. But still you were determined to live your life and make it better for yourself. Filled with new determination you walk across the street and before you had a chance to get away, you got run over by a car as your vision went black.

When you regain your senses you realize that your on grass and you could hear voices. You open your eyes and got up. You were surprised. You seemed to be in a park but that wasnt the most surprising thing. The most surprising thing was that the voices you were hearing came from Pokemon that were walking on two legs! Pokemons that would walk in four legs like growlithe or arcanine they were walking on two legs. You were surprised and noticed one running towards you. You call out to him to be careful only for them to pass by you. You were shocked and you realized that maybe you were a spirit. The last thing you remember was indeed dying. Your surprise went to amazement. You could do anything you want!...or can you? You heard that spirits can interact with the living but how? He decided to test it on the pokemon child that ran past you. It was a cute growlithe that seemed to be 16 years old. Her body was starting to develop as she had a very feminine body. "Hey can you hear me?"you say only for her to continue playing. You didnt know what you were thinking. They wouldnt hear you. Eventually you decide to get very close to them and said something else. "Stop"you say and the female had stopped. Amazed by this you decide to test more. "Um...Scratch your head and neck. They are feeling rather itchy after all"you said in her ear. The female started to scratch her head and neck. After a good bit she stopped and seemed to be relaxed now. She later left, leaving the former human surprised. You could influence the minds of pokemon to what he wants. You would smirk more as you wanted to have more fun with more pokemon. Then you realized something spectacular. Because you were a spirit and could fly. You could go to places you couldnt before. Like Temporal tower or other places. You could interact with the legendary pokemon. Your smirk went wide as all the thoughts of you doing things to the legendaries and pokemon come into your brain. Then again it would be fun to be with normal pokemon. Who knows what you could find?
1.title: The new world of Pokemon

choices: Search for the first female you interacted with
11.content: You thought about it and its better to target normal pokemon instead of Legendaries. They are much easier to find and probably wont cause such a hassle on becoming one. Since you were in a park it gave you lots of pokemon to try out but then again its risky since there are other pokemon everywhere. You notice a map in a billboard and noticed the many places you can go to. Then again it would be fine to look for that female you interacted with. You look at the map and decided to...
11.title: Go after the normal pokemon

choices: Talking with other pokemon her age
Hearing some music on a bench
113.content: You shook your head and began to fly deeper into the park. You wanted to find the growlithe and maybe experiment with her. After all you wanted to know the limits of what you can do to the living. After a while you managed to locate the growlithe, who was...
113.title: Search for the first female you interacted with

12.content:
You decide to target the legendaries. You think about the fact that with becoming a legendary you wouldnt be only taking their bodies, you would be taking their powers. And since they were very strong you couldnt wait to search for them. But first you needed to gather some information about them. So you soon left the park and you soon got into a city looking for clues. The sun began going down when you found enough information about some legendaries. You have these choices now:

You have Dialga, who is a very rich female who owns a big Mansion and is CEO of some big corporation that you dont remember the name. Seems that she has a very attractive body since most males and females seem to be talking about her beauty. It seemed interesting to pay her a visit.

Next you have Mewtwo, who seems to be a very famous actress since you have seen her in various photos relating to movies. And her body seemed delicious to have. Plus the fame would feel nice to have since you never had that growing up.

You heard rumors about Zapdos as well. She seems to be a very popular model who has no fear in showing her beauty. Her style of dresses and clothing is beyond what anybody can make. She seems to live in a very luxurious penthouse and you were impressed by that.

That and will all the other choices you rub your hands, ultimately choosing...
12.title: Go after the legendaries

info.brief_description: A Human is sent to an anthro world of pokemon after dying and toys with legendary pokemon
info.description:
A human died in a accident and is later sent toan anthro version world of Pokemon, devoid of humans. After discovering he is a spirit he decides to toy with the Pokemons there and especially legendaries.

Rules:
You can possess a pokemon, Influence them to do things you want, etc.
The human can only interact with female pokemon. However he can influence a little bit male pokemon.
All Legendary Pokemon are Females.
Chapters have to be detailed.
No end chapters
